title: Weatherization Installers and Technicians
description: Perform a variety of activities to weatherize homes and make them more energy efficient. Duties include repairing windows, insulating ducts, and performing heating, ventilating, and air-conditioning (HVAC) work. May perform energy audits and advise clients on energy conservation measures.

tasks.text: Test combustible appliances, such as gas appliances.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Determine amount of air leakage in buildings, using a blower door machine.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Test and diagnose air flow systems, using furnace efficiency analysis equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Install and seal air ducts, combustion air openings, or ventilation openings to improve heating and cooling efficiency.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect buildings to identify required weatherization measures, including repair work, modification, or replacement.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Recommend weatherization techniques to clients in accordance with needs and applicable energy regulations, codes, policies, or statutes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Apply insulation materials, such as loose, blanket, board, and foam insulation to attics, crawl spaces, basements, or walls.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Make minor repairs using basic hand or power tools and materials, such as glass, lumber, and drywall.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare cost estimates or specifications for rehabilitation or weatherization services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Contact residents or building owners to schedule appointments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Wrap air ducts and water lines with insulating materials, such as duct wrap and pipe insulation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and apply weather-stripping, glazing, caulking, or door sweeps to reduce energy losses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean and maintain tools and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply spackling, compounding, or other materials to repair holes in walls.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Explain recommendations, policies, procedures, requirements, or other related information to residents or building owners.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain activity logs, financial transaction logs, or other records of weatherization work performed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Explain energy conservation measures, such as the use of low flow showerheads and energy-efficient lighting.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare or assist in the preparation of bids, contracts, or written reports related to weatherization work.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install storm windows or storm doors and verify proper fit.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Wrap water heaters with water heater blankets.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
